name: Trips Map
description: A visual index of trip locations. Combines a descriptive text section with a list of active trip regions and a decorative interactive map of Vietnam.

field_schema.label: Eyebrow
field_schema.help: A small, uppercase label displayed above the main heading.

field_schema.label: Heading
field_schema.help: The primary title of the section.

field_schema.label: Body
field_schema.help: The main descriptive text for this section.

test_data.heading: Small country, huge variety.
test_data.body: From Ha Giang's northern passes to the Mekong's palm-lined channels — every region has its own flavor, texture, and pace.
